programme.title: Innovation Nation
programme.desc: Focused on innovation and investment in new technology. Western Australia is a unique market place dominated by innovation in the aerospace, defence industry, mining, oil and gas and now new energy source sectors such as Hydrogen.

programme.title: Jeopardy! (UK)
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts the quiz where he gives answers, and players must provide the questions.

programme.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
programme.desc: The Man of Steel crusades for nuclear disarmament and meets Lex Luthor's latest creation, Nuclear Man.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran starts dating an older man.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran's anniversary as a nanny for the Sheffields is coming up, but Maxwell seems to have forgotten all about it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's parents sell the Cadillac to help Jerry out with some money.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's girlfriend Ellen seems perfect, but everyone else seems to have a problem with her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The daughter of a family friend from Spain arrives with marriage on her mind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester is determined to restore Pugsley and Wednesday's faith in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena turns Darrin's Italian client into a monkey.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora conjures up a little toy that enchants any human who sees it and is guaranteed to make Darrin and his partners very wealthy.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently brings a foreign woman's baby home from the subway and is accused of kidnapping.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran has to pose as Ms Babcock to get an investor interested in Maxwell's next play.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer decides that daylight saving can't come soon enough so decides to set his watch ahead an hour.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George loses a prized key chain in a pothole, Kramer adopts a section of a highway.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A former secret service agent is now a bodyguard for a pop superstar-turned-actress. In the course of protecting the unpredictable star from a homicidal fan, they develop a trust and love that is rare for both.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer decides that daylight saving can't come soon enough so decides to set his watch ahead an hour.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George loses a prized key chain in a pothole, Kramer adopts a section of a highway.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Jaha and Kane disagree over how to handle their grim reality. Meanwhile, Clarke leads a group to save a friend.

programme.title: Love Island UK: All Stars
programme.desc: Bombshell Sophie's arrival is causing one guy's head to spin. Tune in to witness some secret hand holding, a bro code getting broken (or is it?), and a SHOCK text arriving.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Durban
programme.desc: An old favorite visits the ladies, unearthing old wounds and creating new scars. Will she receive a warm welcome? Angel has much to be thankful for as she celebrates her fertility.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The teams have 10 hours to build a model at minifigure scale that's whole on one side but, when it's spun around, reveals a world that's cut in half.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie and Daisy take a trip to Willows, Wisconsin, Barbie’s hometown, where it’s up to Barbie to save her beloved Aunt Adele’s struggling inn.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: To help save the community garden, Barney shows the kids that small things can affect big change! / Silly chaos ensues when the kids can't agree on what game to play and Barney has a hard time keeping up with all the different games.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When Lunia's true identity is revealed, she regales the dream chasers with the epic story of how she became the legendary dream keeper.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When Bubble keeps trying to make her guest's party better, she ends up ignoring what he really wants. /Bubble tries to help her guest Marie with her science experiments.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: Valt offers anyone to face off with his super-powerful friend. So, Bel, Pri and Ranzo go to the Shakadera family dojo just as the mystery Blader completes a 300 Blader challenge.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Khrome Ryugu has been missing since his match with Jaxon at the top of The X, but now faces Omega Shiroboshi. Omega has prepared a trial for Khrome to see if he's worthy of a Bey she helped create.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Police chief Wheeler announces the formation of the $700 million Sky Police.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: When they get into a fight, Barbie volunteers to swap rooms with her sisters Skipper and Stacie. Eventually all of the Roberts sisters learn no roommate is perfect.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! After some bad math skills, our players learn a new yoga pose! Will it impress or have they poorly miscalculated?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers hunt for Lunia's hourglass, which they believe will help them defeat the evil Dreamsmasher.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently brings a foreign woman's baby home from the subway and is accused of kidnapping.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran has to pose as Ms Babcock to get an investor interested in Maxwell's next play.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The daughter of a family friend from Spain arrives with marriage on her mind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: With Darrin's meeting quickly approaching, he and Samantha must track down Serena and get her to change Clio back into a human, but Clio is nowhere to be found, and there is no guarantee that she will sign the contract anyway.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora conjures up a little toy that enchants any human who sees it and is guaranteed to make Darrin and his partners very wealthy.

programme.title: Explore TV
programme.desc: Explore TV takes you around the world to places you'll never forget.

programme.title: Formula E : Highlights
programme.desc: Formula E is more than a just a racing series. Radical cars, all powered by electricity, pave the way for the road cars of tomorrow, with the series acting as a competitive platform to test and develop the latest in electric technology.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: The remaining six teams will be competing in two challenges, High Wire and Secret City, and one team will be going home.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently brings a foreign woman's baby home from the subway and is accused of kidnapping.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran must woo a big investor after her mother and some friends back Maxwell's new play.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A co-worker thinks Elaine's name is \.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry accidentally knocks his girlfriend's toothbrush in the toilet and can't kiss her. George drops his keys in a pothole that gets paved over, and Kramer alters a mile of highway that he adopted.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love--a bearded carnival lady--that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the girl's mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.sub-title: Morticia and Gomez vs Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha has contracted a virus that has her talking in rhyme ...all the time.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When Samantha decides to take up sculpting, Endora zaps up two talking busts of Darrin and Larry Tate.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret which could cost Maxwell a fortune.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: It's Sylvia's birthday and Fran and CC find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is tired and needs to take a nap at work, so he naps under his desk and Kramer takes up swimming in the East River.

programme.title: The Waterboy
programme.desc: An American football team's waterboy puts up with constant ridicule from the players. But one day his anger gets the better of him and he demonstrates an unexpected talent for tackling - so the coach gives him a chance to prove his worth on the pitch. However, he has to keep his blossoming sporting career a secret from his overprotective mother.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is tired and needs to take a nap at work, so he naps under his desk and Kramer takes up swimming in the East River.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: As Praimfaya strikes, Octavia assumes command of the bunker, and Raven leads Clarke's stranded team on a last-minute race to escape destruction.

programme.title: Love Island UK: All Stars
programme.desc: Chris is toying with his emotions big time, there's talk about love languages, and Sophie's stuck in the middle. Plus, someone plans to be brutal in a twisty Truth or Dare game.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programme.desc: The ladies gear up for another getaway to the Drakensberg, but this time Jojo and Nonku land first. Sparks fly early when somebody mentions the word witchcraft and Slee confronts the ladies about their reaction to her incense.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The teams need to create a bridge that can survive two shaking plates. If more than one bridge survives all 12 levels of shaking, the prettiest bridge wins.

programme.title: Cards And Collectables Australia
programme.desc: The force is strong with a Star Wars collector. A film lover whose turned his home into a movie museum. We visit a Trade Day to see what people are chasing and an NBA collector who chose SGA over Luka and is now reaping the rewards.

programme.title: Explore TV
programme.desc: Explore TV takes you around the world to places you'll never forget.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: When they get into a fight, Barbie volunteers to swap rooms with her sisters Skipper and Stacie. Eventually all of the Roberts sisters learn no roommate is perfect.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Barney helps David and Vivie plan something nice for Mel after she breaks her arm; Mel is upset because there are certain things she cannot do with a cast, so Barney comes up with a game that helps Mel accept her abilities with help from a robot arm.

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers hunt for Lunia's hourglass, which they believe will help them defeat the evil Dreamsmasher.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble triggers a dangerous mudslide by trying to please two opposing guests. / When Sadie builds Superina a robot sidekick, its giant springy legs are too much to control - and Bubble must find a way to combine her guest's talents to save the day.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: The stage is set for a masquerade tournament, but the Dark Prince isn't the only belle at this ball! Enter: the masked Blader known as 'Quadra.' Wielding her elemental Bey, Lightning Pandora, Quadra has defeated every foe to come her way.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: The \.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.sub-title: Race to the Top/Metal Harl Hubbs
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest in 'Race to the Top', then in 'Meet Harl Hubbs', we see a day in the life of helpful handyman Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family -- including next-door neighbour Ken -- in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Nerves are tested at the Olympic trials as our players take on the most challenging sport in history - Hobby Horsing!

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: After locating Lunia’s hourglass, the team heads to the dream world’s sun, which holds more secrets than the object they’re searching for!

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret which could cost Maxwell a fortune.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: It's Sylvia's birthday and Fran and CC find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love--a bearded carnival lady--that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the girl's mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.sub-title: Morticia and Gomez vs Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha has contracted a virus that has her talking in rhyme ...all the time.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When Samantha decides to take up sculpting, Endora zaps up two talking busts of Darrin and Larry Tate.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.

programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Formula E : Highlights
programme.desc: Formula E is more than a just a racing series. Radical cars, all powered by electricity, pave the way for the road cars of tomorrow, with the series acting as a competitive platform to test and develop the latest in electric technology.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: Today our teams are put to the test, challenged to build what their vision of the future is, but seen through the view of a window frame.
